channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senior Delhi Police Officer Removed From Security Duties After Controversy Over Protest Incident
item.description: A senior Delhi Police officer, Sandeep Lamba, has been removed from all security-related duties in New Delhi and sent back to his parent posting in the North East district following a controversy over...

item.title: Alberta Business Faces Threat from New Tariffs Under CUSMA
item.description: A small Alberta-based business that previously thrived under the Canada-United States-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) is now facing potential collapse due to new U.S. tariffs. The article highlights how the ...

item.title: A Celebration of Heartwarming TV Finales
item.description: This article explores some of the most emotionally satisfying conclusions from popular television series, highlighting how each show resolved its narrative in a way that resonated with viewers. From t...

item.title: Pakistan and Saudi Arabia Commit to Regional Peace Amid Houthi Threats
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman agreed to strengthen cooperation to ensure regional peace and secure maritime trade in the Red Sea following Houthi attacks on ...

item.title: A new model for electron configuration rules in chemistry
item.description: This article discusses an updated version of the Aufbau principle, known as the 'Construcción principle,' which incorporates two special filling rules to better predict electron configurations in atom...

item.title: Amber Ray Gives Back to Machakos Community by Handing Out Food and Supplies
item.description: Amber Ray, a popular influencer in Kenya, recently returned to her rural roots in Chamwilo, Machakos, accompanied by her partner Kennedy Rapudo. During the visit, she engaged with locals in fluent Kam...

item.title: Kondoa Residents Advocate for School Feeding Programs
item.description: Residents in Kondoa have expressed support for expanding school feeding programs to improve nutrition and education among children. The initiative aims to address food insecurity by providing regular ...

item.title: NDIC pays up to ₦2 million to customers of 46 failed microfinance banks
item.description: The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) has started direct electronic payouts to customers affected by the closure of 46 microfinance banks. Eligible depositors will receive up to ₦2 million ...

item.title: Tesla Faces Profit Decline Amid Ambitious Expansion Plans
item.description: Tesla's second-quarter profits dropped by 5% to $1.1 billion, missing analyst expectations of $53 per share. Despite increased auto sales, weaker profitability was attributed to lower vehicle prices, ...

item.title: President Marcos to honor injured Navy personnel in West Philippine Sea with awards and financial aid
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. will visit two Philippine Navy personnel injured during a confrontation with the Chinese Coast Guard in the West Philippine Sea. During the visit, he will personally con...

item.title: India's Foreign Policy and Economic Relations with China

item.title: President Ruto Criticizes Opposition for Opposing Affordable Housing Programme
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly criticized Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna for opposing his Affordable Housing Programme, calling critics 'brainless' and accusing them of wanting Kenyans to remain in...

item.title: Political Divide Over Ramaphosa's Impeachment Inquiry in South Africa
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has proposed a two-stage approach to Parliament's Section 89 impeachment inquiry into President Cyril Ramaphosa over the 2020 Phala Phala farm burglary. The committ...

item.title: Daily Horoscope for July 23, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: This article provides daily horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 23, 2026. Aries experiences a shift in energy as Mercury ends its retrograde phase, restoring clarity to their life. Taur...

item.title: Tanzania's SMEs Struggle with Public Tenders Due to Tech Gaps
item.description: A new study by the University of Dodoma reveals that despite preferential procurement policies aimed at boosting SME participation in Tanzania's public tenders, small businesses still face significant...

item.title: Australian Exporters Seek Tariff Exemptions Amid Trump's New Tariff Threats
item.description: The article details the growing concerns among Australian exporters as the U.S. government prepares to implement new tariffs on 60 countries, including Australia. These tariffs, proposed at 12.5%, are...

item.title: President Directs Enhanced Monsoon Preparedness Amid 43 Rain-Related Deaths in Punjab and KP

item.title: Nigeria Strengthens Decommissioning Regulations for Sustainable Energy Management
item.description: The 2026 Decommissioning Regulations in Nigeria mark a significant evolution in managing end-of-life petroleum assets. These rules aim to strengthen planning requirements, enhance financial assurance ...
